summary.text: This cellular phone receives positive feedback for its overall quality, with customers describing it as a good phone and noting that the device is okay. The phone arrives in great condition and great shape. However, customers report issues with the screen quality, mentioning that the screen has many obvious scratches. The outer casing also shows clear dents. Customers have mixed opinions regarding the phone's functionality and battery life.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect phone.
authors_reviews.text: I was sceptical about buying a new phone on Amazon but honestly this was awesome. I upgraded from an XR and the phone came basically brand new 114 charge cycles 100% battery health and was very easy to set up. Didn’t come with a single scratch either. Would highly recommend getting this.
authors_reviews.author: Shane

authors_reviews.title: Great condition. Works great
authors_reviews.text: Great shape, a little cosmetic wear on the edges. But otherwise excellent
authors_reviews.author: hayden

authors_reviews.title: Battery life.
authors_reviews.text: I understand this was a renewed device. The device is generally fine. I few small scratches but nothing that a case doesn’t cover. Works well overall. However, I find the battery life to be terrible. I can barely get a day between charges. My old iPhone 11 would give me 2 solid days between charges. Overall, the device is okay, just not happy with battery life. Have no answer as to the seller service yet as I have been waiting for a reply for 2 days.
authors_reviews.author: Leo R.

authors_reviews.title: Wrong charging cable
authors_reviews.text: This iPhone 15 arrived quickly! It had a few more scratches than I thought it should for a refurbished “excellent” condition iPhone but doesn’t affect the use of the phone. Battery is 93%. I’m only giving it 4 stars because it came with a lightning charger and not a c charger which is what this iPhone requires.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Great phone at a great price.
authors_reviews.text: Phone arrived in great shape. The only cosmetic defects found are a small dent on the bottom left corner that is not visible with a case on it, and there was dirt around the one camera lens where it attaches to the phone, that was easy to remove. The battery health is at 90%, and the phone works well. I am replacing an iphone 12 mini 64gb only because i needed more storage. I have been using this phone for almost a week, and so far, so good. I am happy with my pretty pink phone that I got at a great price.
authors_reviews.author: Patricia C.

authors_reviews.title: Battery life and all the app are working pretty good so far.
authors_reviews.author: Preet

authors_reviews.title: I would say it’s worth it if you really need a new phone
authors_reviews.text: Phone came with like one scratch but nothing to serious.but the battery health was a little worse then I thought I got 86 % and that was probably the most disappointing thing about the phone. Because everything else works fine screen was new everything works
authors_reviews.author: David
